name: estate-pixel-claimant-v1
prompt: character portrait for a card game, fantasy bureaucrat claimant, head and shoulders, centred character, readable face, strong silhouette, simple controlled background, stylized low-resolution-friendly rendering, infernal administrative mood, clear costume shape
